title: 一条帖子教你速通多琪全难度❗️
summary: Hello，各位小伙伴们大家好哇，这里是伊瑟新人主播罗生今天给大家讲讲咱们伊瑟的源器本——多琪的一个打法。先给比较懒的小伙伴们放个一图流。接下来讲解下机制敌人拥有额外50%减伤效果，附加控制效果可以暂时移除该效果且多琪本P1由4个【异】相性小怪组成P2由5个【异】相性小怪由此看来需要用到群体控制、群
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"video","src":"https://cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/video/842014/2025/8/27/3424403.mp4","poster":"https://cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_512/h_230/842014/2025/8/27/5100458.jpeg","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"Hello，各位小伙伴们大家好哇，这里是伊瑟新人主播罗生"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"今天给大家讲讲咱们伊瑟的源器本——多琪的一个打法。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"先给比较懒的小伙伴们放个一图流。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"A2d3ef9NP2OSmztz","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_868/h_1954/50364/842014/2025/7/27/961594.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"868px","height":"1954px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"接下来讲解下机制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"敌人拥有额外50%减伤效果，附加控制效果可以暂时移除该效果"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"且多琪本P1由4个【异】相性小怪组成"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"P2由5个【异】相性小怪"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"由此看来需要用到群体控制、群体输出的角色"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"考虑到新人宝宝们前期角色池较浅"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这里控制卡推荐紫卡【酣梦一宵】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"jvVXp0kOUhJTYVGo","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_562/h_382/50364/842014/2025/7/27/582371.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"562px","height":"382px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大招既可以降低敌方攻击又可以造成控制【睡眠】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"点满后3回合即可放一次非常好用"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"源器推荐12【疾驰】，主堆速度和效果命中属性"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"智壳前期推荐【星】减少大招cd高频控制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"接下来是输出卡的选择"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这里不推荐新手任务送的【炼】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"主要因为她是【理】相性角色"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"47zvftuIkFdwJadf","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_848/h_584/50364/842014/2025/7/27/393860.jpeg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"848px","height":"584px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"会被多琪本【异】相性小怪所克制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"导致输出能力大打折扣"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但另一张新手输出卡【格雷】为【虚】相性"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"AlSx6RMYWhxRXBVH","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_643/h_352/50364/842014/2025/7/27/630023.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"643px","height":"352px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"克制【异】相性小怪，非常适配多琪本的环境"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"同时其2技能为全体提高暴击"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大招破防+群体输出的能力"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"能够为全体队伍带来不俗的收益"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"源器推荐12【疾】，主堆效果命中、暴击属性"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"智壳前期推荐【白疾风】、【星】皆可"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"治疗位置推荐首充赠送的紫卡【缬草】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"6ZRP7dGHPDrtw6mk","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_601/h_271/50364/842014/2025/7/27/538053.jpeg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"601px","height":"271px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【缬草】技能点满即可开局提供盾和输出类buff"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"非常好用"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"源器可以选择12【涌泉】，主堆生命、效果抵抗"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"智壳前期推荐【星】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"剩余两名角色可以选择"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【妮璐】集群体输出、伤害加深、单体输出、回血、拉条为一体"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"qJNrUf9b1xuRA1aJ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_700/h_455/50364/842014/2025/7/27/997880.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"700px","height":"455px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"是非常合格的一名副手C位"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"源器推荐12【攻势】，主堆效果命中、暴击属性"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"智壳前期推荐【星】（万能好用）"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"另一位群体输出可以选择【莉露摩卡】【罗喉】、【荼蘼】等"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"B1S4trYaSViBEqiV","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_264/h_272/50364/842014/2025/7/27/846155.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"264px","height":"272px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当然，有欧一点的小伙伴拥有【夜离】、【海因里希】、【弥瑟亚】均可以无脑上"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"如实在没有金色的群体输出角色"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"紫卡【炀】进行拉条、加暴击、加攻击"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"ZrvfRY05CrXmQRGL","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_611/h_275/50364/842014/2025/7/27/342098.jpeg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"611px","height":"275px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"亦或是【RC-77】给敌方减防、减攻击"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"s8QZ4rqCwQ7lnXb1","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_613/h_276/50364/842014/2025/7/27/659411.jpeg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"613px","height":"276px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"都是非常不错的选择"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"使用上述主播推荐的角色阵容基本可以平推到多琪本的地狱难度了"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"接下来我们看下多琪本毕业的【炼狱】难度要如何攻略"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"首先我们来看一下炼狱多琪本的机制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"JJGxYz34Z8IjAVBM","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_583/h_338/50364/842014/2025/7/27/105294.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"583px","height":"338px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炼狱难度下多琪的帮手们对【理】相性异格者造成额外200%伤害"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"且敌人拥有额外90%减伤效果，附加控制效果可以暂时移除该效果"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"对比前面的难度多了整整40%的减伤效果"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那么控制角色的选择非常重要了"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这里还是推荐【酣梦一宵】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"p8ReqO4T1lhfCZmZ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_556/h_340/50364/842014/2025/7/27/479618.jpeg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"556px","height":"340px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"45%的控制概率、3回合的cd、紫色卡的低成本"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"o8HTJXvj6E5l41yM","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1196/h_860/50364/842014/2025/7/27/733896.jpeg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1196px","height":"860px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"确实是目前登场角色中的最优解了"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出位置最优解为【莉露摩卡】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"9BVfuLXwxtpY3bVN","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_622/h_342/50364/842014/2025/7/27/215543.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"622px","height":"342px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【莉露摩卡】为【虚】相性对多琪小怪构成克制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"其技能机制对多小怪的场景非常有效"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"能够将单体的累计伤害进行溅射到全体敌方"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大招点满后击杀敌方，溅射伤害能达到100%"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"非常适合处理多小怪的场景"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"另一位输出推荐同为【虚】相性的【芙蕾雅】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"AFqzguJeVhiYLdPQ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_637/h_354/50364/842014/2025/7/27/691099.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"637px","height":"354px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大招可以为压低血线并为【莉露摩卡】提供攻击加成"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"又C又能拐，2技能的加防御也可以提升队伍的坦度"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"辅助位建议备好一位破防手"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐【虚】相性的【克洛斯】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"o76BNZY3sMSR1A0I","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_644/h_374/50364/842014/2025/7/27/274729.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"644px","height":"374px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大招稳定挂破防和减速"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"能极大降低C位的速度和攻击面板要求"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"最后一位队友的选择当然是伊瑟最人权的辅助卡【梨梨】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"AgKD1e59sMK1PVWr","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_681/h_379/50364/842014/2025/7/27/507672.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"681px","height":"379px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"dcj9VNjJDaWJnr0Z","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_665/h_375/50364/842014/2025/7/27/215239.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"665px","height":"375px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"2技能全体提速并能给主C加爆伤"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"配合3技能更是能直接减少主C的冷却"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"实现两回合两次大招快速清屏的效果"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"智壳的选择方面"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出智壳都带【启示录】，版本最强输出智壳"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"sPx8dgXtbq4G040i","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_348/h_517/50364/842014/2025/7/27/372861.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"348px","height":"517px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"控制和辅助均需携带【万法魔典】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"fDatqRQ6d4guDb3w","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_339/h_402/50364/842014/2025/7/27/182669.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"339px","height":"402px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"能实现两回合双大招，非常契合多琪本"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"配速：梨梨>芙蕾雅>克洛斯>酣梦一宵＞莉露摩卡"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小伙伴们快去试试吧~"}]}]
